stemHtml: You are flying in an area with several TS. You are flying at FL330. What is the best course of action regarding the AWR?

options.a: tilt up to see how high the cloud tops are in order to fly over it with a suitable margin.
options.b: tilt up in order to see the “holes” to fly through in between thunderstorms.
options.c: tilt down as ice crystals have no reflection at this altitude.
options.d: tilt down to account for the curvature of the earth.
